  badge:

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Remove redundant legacy build tags. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
//go:build linux || darwin
// +build linux darwin
```

## Good

```go
//go:build linux || darwin
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only redundant-build-tag`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
